block_03: Did you know that you can increase your conversion rate by 10% just by using words that trigger people’s emotions? We picked some power words that, as we believe, help reach out to traders. Use them wherever you like: in article titles, ads, social media headlines, etc.
block_05: Make things sound more valuable and play on scarcity and fear of missing out
block_07: Kindle interest and the urge to find out what’s behind the headline
block_09: Make your offers sound more accessible, simple, and useful
block_11: Make the reader crave for something
block_13: Indulge the reader's desire to stand out and get the best
block_15: Help build trust between the brand and potential traders
block_16: When adding power words to your copy, always remember: do not advertise IQ Option using false or misleading statements. If you are not sure about a certain word choice, feel free to ask your manager for advice.
